originalTitle: This bond strategy can protect your portfolio even if interest rates go up
summary: A little-known investing formula shows exactly how long to hold bonds to neutralize interest-rate hikes.
content: A little-known investing formula shows exactly how long to hold bonds to neutralize interest-rate hikes.
chineseTitle: 即使利率上升，这种债券策略也可以保护您的投资组合
chineseSummary: 一个鲜为人知的投资公式准确地显示了持有债券多长时间来抵消利率上涨的影响。
chineseContent: 一个鲜为人知的投资公式准确地显示了持有债券多长时间来抵消利率上涨的影响。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
